name_cn:
Premium Grade Fendi Replica
💗 Iconic mini By The Way Boston handbag, original woven raffia material. Paired with brown leather details and matching leather tubular handle. Zipper closure. Interior lined with pockets and gold-finish metal hardware. This handbag comes with a handle and an adjustable, detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Size 18.12.9cm
Style 067
